Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Appoint And Arbitrator
Off Calendar Sep-19-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Atty. S. Lynn Appleton of the Merrill Law Group, Tel. No. 1-925-833-1000 appearing
for the Petitioner;
Atty. Charles Katz, Tel. No. 1-650-692-4100 appearing for thr Respondent.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF SUPERISI, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION's Motion To Compel Arbitration And Appoint And Arbitrator -
Petitioner Superisi, Inc.'s petition to compel arbitration and appoint an arbitrator is granted. The parties have entered into a valid written Dissolution and Separation Agreement and have agreed to arbitrate any controversy arising out of or related to this agreement. The parties' dispute as to the respondent's performance of his obligations under the agreement, as well as to the custody and possession of documents allegedly necessary to fulfill obligations under the agreement, are within the scope of the parties' agreement to arbitrate and should be arbitrated. (Garcia v. Superior Court (2015) 236 Cal.App.4th 1138, 1144.) Pursuant to the parties' stipulation from June 5, 2018, the court appoints Hon. Ken Kawaichi (Ret.) as the arbitrator. Petitioner's request for sanctions is denied without prejudice for failing to comply with the procedural requirements of Code of Civ. Proc. 128.5(f)(1)(A).
Order signed in open court. Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600 =302/ac
